meaning: n.岳得尔歌(一种流行与瑞士和奥地利山民间的民歌)v.用真假嗓音陡然互换地唱
examples: You haven't lived till you've learned how to yodel at a tea dance in a mountain hut!
They are listening to the local yokel yodel.
Taylor taught herself how to yodel using this book and tape.
But a yodel from the broad summit of Ebenalp into the steep narrow valley is the real deal.
Then, at the door of their gingerbread-cute yet massive home, the entire clan greeted us with a Christmas yodel.
